units.source_text: 於本公司股東利益而行使所賦予的權力以購回本公司股份。根據上市規則的規定，
units.translation_target_text: exercise the conferred power to repurchase the Company's shares in the interests of the Company's shareholders. According to the provisions of the Listing Rules,

units.source_text: 通函附錄一已提供說明函件，內容包含了令本公司股東能對所提呈決議案作出

units.source_text: (i) 倘若預料於股東大會當日上午六時正後，將懸掛八號或以上颱風信號，或黑色

units.source_text: 暴雨警告訊號將會生效，則股東大會將會延期舉行，而本公司會於本公司網站

units.source_text: 或聯交所網站登載補充通告，通知各股東有關延會日期、時間及地點。
units.translation_target_text: Or publish a supplementary notice on the website of the Stock Exchange to inform shareholders of the date, time and place of the postponed meeting.

units.source_text: 在黃色或紅色暴雨警告生效期間，股東大會將會如期舉行。於惡劣天氣情況下，
units.translation_target_text: During the period when the yellow or red rainstorm warning is in effect, the general meeting of shareholders will be held as scheduled. In bad weather conditions,

units.source_text: 股東需自行決定應否出席股東大會。決定出席者亦應留意自身情況，並建議需
units.translation_target_text: Shareholders need to decide for themselves whether they should attend the general meeting. Those who decide to attend should also pay attention to their own situation and make suggestions if necessary
